section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

**Stamp:** HAND DELIVERED / LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER / 18 MAR -9 AM 9:41 / U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES / MC (For Official Use Only)

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna

**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No

*If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance.*

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** For amendments, please provide the date of the report you are amending.
- [X] Initial Report
- [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: ______

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

---

Transaction grid (columns: SP/DC/JT | FULL ASSET NAME | Type of Transaction: Purchase/Sale/Exchange | Date of Transaction (MM/DD/YY) | Date Notified of Transaction (MM/DD/YY) | Amount of Transaction A-K).

Amount buckets: A $1,001-$15,000, B $15,001-$50,000, C $50,001-$100,000, D $100,001-$250,000, E $250,001-$500,000, F $500,001-$1,000,000, G $1,000,001-$5,000,000, H $5,000,001-$25,000,000, I $25,000,001-$50,000,000, J Over $50,000,000, K Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000.

- Example row (JT): Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale — 02/05/015 — 03/07/15 — B $15,001-$50,000 [greyed example]
- First data row: "Please see the attached"
- Remaining grid rows on this page are blank.
